summary.name: PEP
summary.oneLiner: A clean, light protein drink for people who want to hit their protein target without the heaviness of a shake.
summary.positioningStatement: For disciplined, health-oriented adults who want convenient protein without bulk or gym-bro associations, PEP is a light, refreshing protein drink that slots into daily routines — post-gym, mid-morning, or between meals — with no heaviness, no compromise, and no gimmicks.
